faqs.question: How quickly can you provide drain fly treatment in Cypress Hills?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service to Cypress Hills residents. Most drain fly treatments can be scheduled within 24 hours of your call, and our technicians typically complete the initial treatment in 1-2 hours depending on the severity of the infestation.

faqs.question: What causes drain flies in Cypress Hills homes?
faqs.answer: Drain flies thrive in the organic matter that accumulates in drains, pipes, and sewage systems. In Cypress Hills, older plumbing infrastructure, infrequent drain cleaning, and the humid climate create ideal breeding conditions. They're especially common in bathroom and kitchen drains where biofilm builds up.

faqs.question: What does your $350-$550 drain fly treatment include?
faqs.answer: Our comprehensive treatment includes a thorough inspection of all drains and potential breeding sites, professional-grade bio-enzymatic drain cleaning, targeted application of safe treatment solutions, removal of organic buildup, and a follow-up visit if needed. The final price depends on the number of drains treated and severity of infestation.

faqs.question: How can I prevent drain flies from returning after treatment?
faqs.answer: Regular drain maintenance is key to preventing re-infestation. We recommend weekly hot water flushes, monthly bio-enzymatic drain cleaner applications, keeping drains covered when not in use, and fixing any leaky pipes promptly. We provide detailed prevention guidelines specific to your property after treatment.
